NC SUD Application: Smoke and Pilot Evaluation

Status

This report is intentionally limited to the smoke and pilot profiles. The full profile is defined but was not run in this phase because it requires 160,000 MLE fits. Results below validate the application pipeline and provide preliminary ranking behavior only; they are not final study evidence.

profile scenario_rows
pilot 64
smoke 8
Profile Population source
smoke NC OSBM county-population-totals API, 2024 Total Population Estimate
pilot NC OSBM county-population-totals API, 2024 Total Population Estimate

Deferred Full Run

The full profile remains reserved for later execution:

  • tau = c(0.8, 1.0, 1.5, 2.0, 3.0)
  • gamma = c(0.5, 0.6, 0.7, 0.8)
  • rho = c(0, 0.01, 0.20, 0.50)
  • Queen neighbors only
  • spillover_type = "both"
  • 25 design resamples and 10 outcome resamples
  • 160,000 MLE fits total
